creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Keep this bakery in your mind if you’re visiting D3 in Dubai! 

Bageri Form is a Scandinavian-inspired bakery serving freshly-baked, high quality bread and pastries. It’s a lovely place to unwind. Aesthetic is minimal yet on point. Outdoor seating is cozy with Burj Khalifa view! 

What we had:
🫐 Custard Cream and Forest Berry Danish: 25 AED
🥐 Cheese Croissant: 25 AED
🤎 Swedish Cinnamon Bun: 23 AED
🍵 Tea in a pot: 22 AED 

All day breakfast is also available! 

Tag your foodie buddies!

P.S. Thanks to our long time IG friend @sienaamariee for the Swedish Bun treat! Hope to see you again soon.
